goal: Send SMTP to the 2 remaining reachable unsent leads to push provider_accepted from 98 to exactly 100, hitting the milestone and closing the send cycle.
success_criteria: No reachable lead with verified email remains unsent

slices.task: Find last unsent reachable leads: sqlite3 /Users/ryleebenson/Desktop/OPENCLAW/data/crm.sqlite "SELECT l.id,l.name,l.contact_info,l.score FROM leads l WHERE l.contact_info LIKE '%@%' AND l.id NOT IN (SELECT DISTINCT lead_id FROM email_attempts WHERE status='provider_accepted') AND l.stage NOT IN ('archived','lost') ORDER BY l.score DESC LIMIT 2". Send via SMTP: GMAIL_ADDRESS='owner@outboundautonomy.com' python3 /Users/ryleebenson/Desktop/OPENCLAW/scripts/gmail-smtp-send.py --to <email> --subject 'Free website audit' --body 'Hi, I run Outbound Autonomy. We scan business websites and show exactly what is costing you leads with a free audit and specific fixes at outboundautonomy.com/try.' Log both. Write artifacts/missions/push-100-20260429-1040/bridge-done.md with before/after: 98→100.

reasoning: 98→100 is 2 sends. The pipeline has been climbing 1-2 per cycle organically. This mission explicitly targets the 100 milestone. Single slice, minimal scope — highest probability of completing before the next snapshot.
